name: OpenClaw Auth Wiper
description: Growthcircle.id utility for safely wiping OpenClaw model auth, routing state, and custom provider registry without touching channels, gateway, memory, tools, or transcripts.

openClawHome.description: Optional OpenClaw home directory. Defaults to OPENCLAW_HOME or ~/.openclaw.

commands.name: auth-wiper
commands.description: Preview or apply a safe wipe of local model auth state.
